globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' cdn.jsdelivr.net cdnjs.cloudflare.com kit.fontawesome.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com ka-p.fontawesome.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ka-p.fontawesome.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'
